member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Registration.DreamineLoggingWpfRegistration
member.summary: Provides registration helpers for Dreamine WPF logging services.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Registration.DreamineLoggingWpfRegistration.Register(System.Action{Dreamine.Logging.Options.DreamineLoggingOptions})
member.summary: Registers Dreamine core logging services and WPF logging services.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Registration.DreamineLoggingWpfRegistration.Reset
member.summary: Resets static registration state for tests.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.BatchedDispatcher`1
member.summary: Coalesces high-frequency UI updates into batches dispatched on the WPF UI thread.
member.remarks: Producers call from any thread. The dispatcher schedules at most one pending at a time; all items queued in between are drained in one callback. A single batch is capped at items so the UI thread is not blocked too long even under bursty logging — overflow is processed in the next pass.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.BatchedDispatcher`1.MaxBatchSize
member.summary: Maximum number of items processed in a single UI-thread batch.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.BatchedDispatcher`1.#ctor(System.Windows.Threading.Dispatcher,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{`0}},System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Callback invoked on the UI thread with the drained batch.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.BatchedDispatcher`1.Enqueue(`0)
member.summary: Enqueues an item for batched UI delivery.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.ILogUiDispatcher
member.summary: Abstracts UI thread dispatching for log view models.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.ILogUiDispatcher.Dispatcher
member.summary: Gets the underlying dispatcher used by batched UI updates.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.ILogUiDispatcher.Invoke(System.Action)
member.summary: Executes the specified action on the UI thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.ILogUiDispatcher.BeginInvoke(System.Action)
member.summary: Executes the specified action asynchronously on the UI thread.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.WpfLogUiDispatcher
member.summary: Provides UI thread dispatching for WPF log views.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.WpfLogUiDispatcher.Dispatcher
member.summary: Gets the underlying WPF .

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.WpfLogUiDispatcher.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the current application or thread dispatcher.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.WpfLogUiDispatcher.#ctor(System.Windows.Threading.Dispatcher)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.WpfLogUiDispatcher.Invoke(System.Action)
member.summary: Executes the specified action on the UI thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.WpfLogUiDispatcher.BeginInvoke(System.Action)
member.summary: Executes the specified action asynchronously on the UI thread at priority.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel
member.summary: Provides the view model for the Dreamine log panel.
member.remarks: Bounds the visible collection so memory usage cannot grow unboundedly under sustained logging. Incoming entries from any thread are coalesced into UI-thread batches via , preventing the WPF dispatcher queue from accumulating pending operations.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel.DefaultDisplayCapacity
member.summary: Default maximum number of entries kept in .

member.name: E:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel.EntryAppended
member.summary: Raised on the UI thread after a batch has been appended, with the most recent entry. Bind a view-side handler here to scroll the DataGrid.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel.Entries
member.summary: Gets the log entries displayed by the log panel.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel.AutoScroll
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the most recent entry is auto-selected.
member.remarks: Defaults to true. When the user manually selects an older entry the caller can set this to false so the selection no longer jumps.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel.SelectedEntry
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected log entry.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel.SelectedDetailText
member.summary: Gets the detail text of the selected log entry.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel.#ctor(Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogStore,Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.ILogUiDispatcher)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel.#ctor(Dreamine.Logging.Interfaces.IDreamineLogStore,Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Services.ILogUiDispatcher,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Maximum number of entries kept in .

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.ViewModels.DreamineLogPanelViewModel.Clear
member.summary: Clears all displayed log entries and the underlying store.
member.remarks: The clear command is serialized through the same UI batch queue as pending appends, so any in-flight entries arriving from worker threads are discarded together with the existing display.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Views.DreamineLogPanelView
member.summary: DreamineLogPanelView.xaml에 대한 상호 작용 논리
DreamineLogPanelView

member.name: M:Dreamine.Logging.Wpf.Views.DreamineLogPanelView.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent
